Custom Alphabet Yard Letters for Event Displays & Outdoor Celebrations

Create memorable outdoor displays with our complete 26-piece alphabet yard letter sets. These weatherproof coroplast letters allow you to spell out custom messages for birthdays, graduations, welcome home celebrations, retirement parties, anniversaries, and special announcements.

Each letter stands 18" tall with varying widths optimized for readability. The UV-resistant 4mm corrugated plastic construction ensures your message stays vibrant through outdoor weather conditions. Available in multiple template designs and font styles to match your celebration theme.

Perfect for front yard displays, event venues, party decorations, and milestone celebrations where you need eye-catching custom messaging that withstands outdoor elements.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Coroplast Material for Durable ABC Yard Sign Letters

Weatherproof 4mm Corrugated Plastic Construction

Your alphabet yard letters are digitally printed in full color on premium 4mm white corrugated plastic material. This lightweight yet durable coroplast features hollow fluted construction similar to cardboard but engineered for outdoor durability.

Material Benefits:

  • UV-resistant printing prevents fading in direct sunlight
  • Waterproof construction withstands rain and moisture
  • Lightweight design for easy installation and repositioning
  • Tear-resistant material handles wind and weather
  • Available in single-sided or double-sided printing

The corrugated plastic substrate provides excellent print quality while maintaining structural integrity for temporary and semi-permanent outdoor displays.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Alphabet Yard Letter Finishing & Installation Options

Each letter in your 26-piece alphabet set is precision cut to 18" height with proportional width spacing for optimal readability. Letters are delivered ready for ground installation or display mounting.

Standard Finishing Includes:

  • Precision die-cutting for clean letter edges
  • UV-resistant ink application
  • Weather-sealed edges
  • Lightweight design for easy handling

Display Options:

  • Ground stakes for lawn installation (sold separately)
  • Wire easel backs for freestanding display
  • Mounting holes for fence or wall attachment
  • Portable setup for event use

The corrugated construction allows for easy customization of mounting methods based on your specific display requirements.

Alphabet Yard Letter Production & Turnaround Times

Choose from flexible production timelines ranging from one to five business days, giving you control over your project schedule and budget.

1 Business Day Priority Production

Fast-track production for urgent celebrations and last-minute events.

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST process the following business day
  • Emergency same-day production available in select cases
  • Production time plus shipping time determines total delivery
  • Turnaround begins when file upload completes and approval is given

2 Business Days Express Production

Ideal balance of speed and cost-effectiveness for planned celebrations.

  • Popular option for weekend events and parties
  • Allows time for design review and adjustments
  • Consistent quality with expedited processing

3 Business Days Standard Production

Our most popular production timeline, offering optimal value and reliability.

5 Business Days Saver Production

Budget-friendly option for advance planning with maximum cost savings.

Shipping Options for Alphabet Yard Letter Delivery

General Shipping Guidelines for Yard Letters

Your 26-piece alphabet letter set ships carefully packaged to prevent damage during transit. The lightweight corrugated plastic construction keeps shipping costs economical while ensuring safe delivery.

Packaging Standards:

  • Letters are flat-packed with protective separation
  • Moisture-resistant packaging for weather protection
  • Clearly labeled packages for easy identification
  • Tracking information provided for all shipments

Available Shipping Methods

Ground Shipping:

  • Standard delivery in 3-7 business days
  • Most economical option for advance planning
  • Fully insured and trackable

Express Shipping:

  • 2-day and overnight options available
  • Ideal for priority production orders
  • Signature confirmation included

Freight Options:

Large quantity orders may qualify for freight shipping with specialized handling and delivery appointment scheduling.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

ABC Yard Sign Letters - Frequently Asked Questions

What material are yard letters printed on?

Our alphabet yard letters are printed on 4mm corrugated plastic (coroplast), a lightweight yet durable material that's waterproof, UV-resistant, and perfect for outdoor display. The hollow fluted construction provides strength while keeping the letters easy to handle and install.

Are yard letter signs waterproof?

Yes, both the coroplast material and UV-resistant inks are completely waterproof. Your letters will maintain their appearance and structural integrity through rain, snow, and outdoor moisture exposure.

What font styles can I choose from?

We offer three professional font options: Capucine Basic Italic for elegant script styling, Helvetica Neue Lt 85 Heavy for bold readability, and Urbane Rounded Heavy for friendly, approachable lettering. All fonts are optimized for outdoor visibility.

Are they printed in color?

Yes, all letters are printed in full color using our digital printing process. Template designs include vibrant colors, patterns, and special effects like glitter and gradients that maintain their appearance outdoors.

I don't want to fuss with individual letters. Do you make a yard letter sign that already says Happy Birthday — or something else?

While this product provides individual letters for maximum flexibility, we do offer pre-made message signs for common celebrations. Contact our customer service team to discuss custom single-piece sign options for specific messages.

How tall and wide are these letters?

All letters are cut to 18" tall for consistent visibility. Width varies by letter design - narrow letters like "I" are approximately 4" wide, while wider letters like "M" or "W" are approximately 14" wide. This proportional sizing ensures balanced, readable displays.
